statement: CoreWeave lists North America on-demand Nvidia GPU instance prices, e.g. HGX H100 (8 GPUs) at $49.24/hour (= $6.155/GPU-hr), a static price level with no stated baseline or change.
why: Records the prevailing Nvidia GPU cloud rental price level at a neocloud as a display overlay; no baseline or change is stated, so it carries no demand/supply direction.

impact.mechanism: On-demand rental price level for Nvidia GPUs at CoreWeave; display overlay only, auto-excluded from the index and not a demand/supply signal.

confidence.basis: Vendor's own pricing page (secondary tier); no explicit publication/update date, price level only.

dispersion: Per-GPU-hr conversions range from A100 at $2.70/GPU-hr to GB200 NVL72 at $10.50/GPU-hr across the listed instances.
